seed_instruction: Evaluate the storyline of the Harry Potter series.
org_constraint: The response must contain at least nine sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at most eight sentences.
instruction: Evaluate the storyline of the Harry Potter series. The response must contain at least nine sentences. The response must contain at most eight sentences.
response: The Harry Potter series follows a young boy's journey from an orphan to a hero. It masterfully blends themes of friendship, courage, and the fight against injustice. J.K. Rowling creates a rich, immersive world filled with intricate lore and magic. The progression of the plot mirrors the characters' growth from childhood to adulthood. Each book builds tension toward the ultimate confrontation with Lord Voldemort. The narrative structure effectively balances personal stakes with a larger global conflict. It remains a cornerstone of modern fantasy literature due to its emotional depth. This storyline resonates with readers of all ages across the globe.<turn|>
